ResearchProjectDef.label: experimental pharmacology
ResearchProjectDef.description: Repurpose the colony's medical and chemical stocks into something the glitterworld pharmacopeia never sanctioned. Unlocks the experimentation bench, where doctors combine reagents into compounds of unknown effect.

ResearchProjectDef.label: drug refinement
ResearchProjectDef.description: Stabilize and concentrate existing drugs into graded variants. Discovered by testing a refinement sample, or researched the long way.

ResearchProjectDef.label: precipice synthesis
ResearchProjectDef.description: How to synthesize Precipice reliably. Discovered by testing Precipice, or researched the long way.

ResearchProjectDef.label: regenerative grafting
ResearchProjectDef.description: Reconstruct scarred tissue surgically. Discovered by testing Tissue Regenerant, or researched the long way.

ResearchProjectDef.label: nerve reconduction
ResearchProjectDef.description: Repair damaged nerves surgically. Discovered by testing Nerve Conduction Gel, or researched the long way.

ResearchProjectDef.label: cortical tuning
ResearchProjectDef.description: Fine-tune the cortex for faster learning. Discovered by testing Synaptic Accelerant, or researched the long way.
